seoTitle: Bobs Farm vs Boco — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bobs Farm and Boco. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bobs Farm vs Boco: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bobs Farm and Boco.
heading: Bobs Farm vs Boco — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bobs Farm, New South Wales and Boco, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boco has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Bobs Farm (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bobs Farm or Boco safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bobs Farm has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Boco scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bobs Farm scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Boco scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bobs Farm or Boco?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boco has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
